name: COFCO Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
summary: COFCO Biotechnology Co., Ltd. produces and sells fuel ethanol, citric acid, and lactic acid in China. The company was formerly known as COFCO Biochemical (Anhui) Co., Ltd. and changed its name to COFCO Biotechnology Co., Ltd. in September 2019. COFCO Biotechnology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Bengbu, China.
